creator: andrey@bsdnir.info
text:
Very sad different system have multy network share http://wiki.openindiana.org/oi/Using+OpenIndiana+as+a+storage+server … ZFSonLinux too, FreeBSD not.

OpenIndiana/ZFSonLinux syntax
zfs set sharenfs=rw=@192.168.5.0/24:@192.168.9.0/24 yourpool/yourshare

We have old patch https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=147881 for another syntax

Please implement this or a similar patch. it's need this for dual 
IPv4/IPv6 setups
